prompt:
Hydroponic net cups fully air-dried after sanitizing: a neat row of net cups placed upside-down on a clean drying rack or paper towel, with subtle water sheen gone and a few faint drying marks on the surface. A small tray of inert starter plugs or seedling cubes sits nearby to suggest “ready for planting,” without any packaging or readable text.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk prep area: soft cinematic lighting, minimal clutter, no logos, no readable markings, and no on-image text. Composition is simple and centered so the dried net cups read clearly as the item.
